# ClearKanvas Global

> ClearKanvas Global is a business services partner that builds and runs finance, talent, technology, and operations functions for growing companies. Expert teams operate as an extension of the client's own team, delivered primarily from Pakistan, serving clients in the USA, Pakistan, and Bahrain and growing into new markets. Tagline: "Where complexity becomes clarity."

## About
- Company: ClearKanvas Global
- What we do: finance & accounting, reporting & business intelligence, global capability centers / offshore teams, HR & talent, customer experience & BPO, AI & automation, technology & digital, advisory & transformation.
- Model: we advise, build, and run. Clients engage us for a single service or an entire offshore capability.
- Locations: USA, Pakistan (primary delivery center, Islamabad), Bahrain.
- Office: Plot 1-E, Lower Ground Floor, Ali Plaza, Blue Area, Islamabad, Pakistan.
- Contact: hello@clearkanvas.com, sales@clearkanvas.com, partnerships@clearkanvas.com, +92 309 6661176.
